use_cases: Visualizing project completion or task progress in dashboards
Displaying skill levels or expertise percentages in profiles
Showing goal achievement metrics in gamified applications
Representing loading or upload progress in media-heavy interfaces
Indicating budget utilization or spending limits in finance apps
ai_summary: A segmented progress bar component with smooth cubic-eased animations and interactive hover states on individual segments. Supports customizable segment count, label display, and percentage indicators. The component animates on mount and value changes, providing visual feedback through scale and color transitions on segment hover. Ideal for dashboards, project trackers, and data visualization interfaces requiring granular progress representation.
